# Screenshots

Replace these placeholder filenames with real screenshots from your running dashboard.

| Filename | What to capture |
|---|---|
| `screenshot-livefeed.png` | Live Feed tab — busy with incoming events |
| `screenshot-replay.png` | Session Replay tab — SSH session playing back |
| `screenshot-credentials.png` | Credentials tab — list of captured SSH/Telnet logins |
| `screenshot-samples.png` | Samples tab — malware list with AI analysis |
| `screenshot-redis-rce.png` | Redis RCE tab — a full RCE chain expanded |
| `screenshot-ai-journal.png` | AI Journal tab — strategy decisions log |

Recommended size: **1280×720px** or **1440×900px**, PNG format.
